productDisplayName: Fila Men's Agony Black Red Shoe
description: Motor Sports enthusiasts have a new reason to ride an extra mile with these dedicated shoes from fila, named Agony. With plenty of suede and stitch overlays, the footwear is engineered to withstand excessive wear and tear on the track. The textured outsole ensures that your feet stay firmly on the stand while you concentrate on the job in hand.Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations for heavy structure and great breathability Stitch detailing with suede overlays on the forefoot to extend durability and enhance shoe structure Central lacing system with a suede border for a comfortable, customised Fit Heavily padded collar and plush tongue for snug fit Brand name embossed on suede patch bordering the toe guard for style Brand logo featured in a metallic casing on heel cup Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Made of durable rubber to withstand excessive usage Pivot point below the big toe mound and the heel for easy 180 degree foot rotation Flex grooves all over the outsole for added flexibility and traction Shoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
